lessons.summary: Serve portfolio image assets from public/pics, not root pics, for /pics URLs.
lessons.detail: During the /propertyphotography smoke test, the page loaded but a Rosebert image URL under /pics/rosebert returned 404 because the files had only been added under the root pics/rosebert directory. Existing working assets were served from public/pics, so the fix was to mirror the Rosebert .webp files into public/pics/rosebert and verify the URLs returned 200.

triggers.value: Next.js public static assets for /pics URLs

lessons.summary: Do not rely on node_modules/next/dist/docs for local Next.js docs in this project.
lessons.detail: An attempt to follow a presumed local Next docs path at node_modules/next/dist/docs failed because that directory does not exist in the installed next@15.5.18 package. The available local documentation is node_modules/next/README.md, which points to https://nextjs.org/docs.

decisions.summary: Rosebert Suites leads the property photography portfolio.
decisions.detail: Rosebert Suites should appear first on /propertyphotography, with BHive Hotel and Pitstop following after it. This ordering was chosen explicitly by the user rather than appending the new section after existing entries.

decisions.summary: Rosebert Suites uses all 14 images in a fixed randomized order.
decisions.detail: The Rosebert Suites section should include all 14 images from pics/rosebert. The order should be randomized once in source code, not randomized on each page load, to keep the portfolio stable and avoid runtime/hydration issues.

domain.summary: Rosebert Suites is a property photography portfolio section.
domain.detail: Rosebert Suites is part of the /propertyphotography portfolio and uses Rosebert image assets. The completed implementation references the Rosebert images, displays the section before BHive Hotel and Pitstop, and keeps /propertyphotography static.
